artPrompt: A characterful portrait of a frenzied red goblin soldier charging across a torn-up lawn in the feral town square, a blank placard clutched like a battle standard and a mallet swinging, divots of grass flying behind his pounding feet. Sparks and confetti rain, a bonfire blazes, overturned ballot boxes scattered around. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, zealous lawn-trashing fervor, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Yard Sign Zealot
text:
Haste
When Yard Sign Zealot enters the battlefield, create three Lawn Sign tokens. (A Lawn Sign is a red artifact with "Attacking Goblins you control get +1/+0 for each Lawn Sign you control.")
Whenever Yard Sign Zealot attacks, you may sacrifice a Lawn Sign. If you do, draw a card.
flavorText: He doesn't change minds, but he sure does change yards.
